text: I feel the sterile calm of a museum or gallery as I approach the entrance, curious and a little cautious. The space is orderly, quiet, yet charged with the anticipation of discovery. Inside, the vibrant R+D wall and its illuminated text invite reflection on innovation, development, and our relationship with technology. I am both observer and participant, aware of my own curiosity, and pondering the boundaries between human and machine, past and future. There’s a subtle thrill in being surrounded by knowledge, possibility, and the thoughtful design of the space. I feel engaged, reflective, and quietly inspired.
